items.desc: Prisma Client 扩展实现 paginate() 和 exists()
items.test_case: AC-01: paginate returns correct data and pagination metadata

items.desc: Session 列表接口返回 { items, pagination } 格式并支持分页参数
items.test_case: AC-02: list returns paginated result with items and pagination

items.desc: User 表新增 role 和 isActive 字段，数据库迁移成功
items.test_case: AC-03: schema migration adds role and isActive columns

items.desc: RolesGuard 和 @Roles() 装饰器正确校验 ADMIN 权限
items.test_case: AC-04: RolesGuard allows ADMIN and rejects USER

items.desc: GET /admin/users 支持分页、搜索、状态过滤，仅 ADMIN 可访问
items.test_case: AC-05: admin users list with pagination search and filter

items.desc: PATCH /admin/users/:id/status 可切换用户状态，仅 ADMIN 可访问
items.test_case: AC-06: admin can toggle user active status

items.desc: 登录接口拒绝 isActive=false 的用户，返回 403
items.test_case: AC-07: login rejects disabled user with 403
